StmtSimple.StatementText:
SELECT tbl.name AS [Name], SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) AS [Schema], 'Server[@Name=' + quotename(CAST( serverproperty(N'Servername') AS sysname),'''') + ']' + '/Database[@Name=' + quotename(db_name(),'''') + ']' + '/Table[@Name=' + quotename(tbl.name,'''') + ' and @Schema=' + quotename(SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id),'''') + ']' AS [Urn], tbl.create_date AS [CreateDate], CAST(tbl.is_memory_optimized AS bit) AS [IsMemoryOptimized], CAST(CASE idx.type WHEN 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [HasClusteredColumnStoreIndex], CAST(ISNULL(historyTable.object_id, 0) AS int) AS [HistoryTableID], CAST(ISNULL(historyTable.name, N'') AS sysname) AS [HistoryTableName], CAST(ISNULL(SCHEMA_NAME(historyTable.schema_id), N'') AS sysname) AS [HistoryTableSchema], tbl.temporal_type AS [TemporalType], CAST(CASE WHEN 'PS'=dsidx.type THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [IsPartitioned], CAST( ISNULL((SELECT distinct 1 from sys.all_columns WHERE object_id = tbl.object_id AND is_sparse = 1), 0) AS bit) AS [HasSparseColumn], CAST(ISNULL((select top 1 1 from sys.indexes ind where ind.object_id = tbl.object_id and ind.type > 1 and ind.is_hypothetical = 0 ), 0) AS bit) AS [HasNonClusteredIndex], CAST(CASE idx.index_id WHEN 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [HasClusteredIndex], CAST(case idx.index_id when 1 then case when (idx.is_primary_key + 2*idx.is_unique_constraint = 1) then 1 else 0 end else 0 end AS bit) AS [HasPrimaryClusteredIndex], CAST(ISNULL((select top 1 1 from sys.indexes ind where ind.object_id = tbl.object_id and ind.type = 3 and ind.is_hypothetical = 0 ), 0) AS bit) AS [HasXmlIndex], CAST(ISNULL((select top 1 1 from sys.all_columns as clmns join sys.types as usrt on usrt.user_type_id = clmns.user_type_id where clmns.object_id = tbl.object_id and usrt.name = N'xml'), 0) AS bit) AS [HasXmlData], CAST(ISNULL((select top 1 1 from sys.all_columns as clmns join sys.types as usrt on usrt.user_type_id = clmns.user_type_id where clmns.object_id = tbl.object_id and usrt.name in (N'geometry', N'geography')), 0) AS bit) AS [HasSpatialData], CAST(ISNULL((select top 1 1 from sys.indexes ind where ind.object_id = tbl.object_id and ind.type = 6 and ind.is_hypothetical = 0 ), 0) AS bit) AS [HasNonClusteredColumnStoreIndex] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.indexes AS idx ON idx.object_id = tbl.object_id and (idx.index_id < @_msparam_0 or (tbl.is_memory_optimized = 1 and idx.index_id = (select min(index_id) from sys.indexes where object_id = tbl.object_id)))
LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.tables as historyTable ON historyTable.object_id = tbl.history_table_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.data_spaces AS dsidx ON dsidx.data_space_id = idx.data_space_id WHERE (CAST( case when tbl.is_ms_shipped = 1 then 1 when ( select major_id from sys.extended_properties where major_id = tbl.object_id and minor_id = 0 and class = 1 and name = N'microsoft_database_tools_support') is not null then 1 else 0 end AS bit)=@_msparam_1 and tbl.is_filetable=@_msparam_2 and CAST(tbl.is_memory_optimized AS bit)=@_msparam_3 and tbl.temporal_type=@_msparam_4 and CAST(tbl.is_external AS bit)=@_msparam_5)

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CONVERT(tinyint,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[indepid] as [ct].[indepid] IS NOT NULL THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[depid] as [ht].[depid] IS NOT NULL THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END,0)
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN 'PS'=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysclsobjs].[type] as [o].[type] THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(5) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid]=(1) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)

CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[indid] as [i].[indid]=(1) THEN CASE WHEN (CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(32),0),0)+(2)*CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(64),0),0))=(1) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END ELSE (0) END,0)

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]=(0) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[status2] as [o].[status2]&(2),0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(bit,[@_msparam_2],0) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[status2] as [o].[status2]&(8),0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(bit,[@_msparam_3],0) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U' AND CONVERT(bit,CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0),0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(bit,[@_msparam_5],0)
CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [Expr1848]=(1) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysxprops].[id] as [p].[id] IS NOT NULL THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END,0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(bit,[@_msparam_1],0)

CONVERT(tinyint,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[indepid] as [ct].[indepid] IS NOT NULL THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[depid] as [ht].[depid] IS NOT NULL THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END,0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(tinyint,[@_msparam_4],0)

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]=(0) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U'

CASE WHEN [Expr1847]<>(0) THEN (0) ELSE isnull([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syssingleobjrefs].[indepid] as [ds].[indepid],(1)-([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256))/(256)) END

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]>(1) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(0) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256),0)=(0) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))>(0))

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(0) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256),0)=(0) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))>(0))

[mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[utype]=[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysscalartypes].[id] as [t].[id] AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(4096))=(4096) AND (serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>8 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=12 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=5 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(134217728))<>(0) OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=8 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(-2147483648))<>(0))

([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(4096))=(4096) AND (serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>8 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=12 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=5 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(134217728))<>(0) OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=8 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(-2147483648))<>(0))

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[type] as [i].[type]=(6) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(0) AND CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(256),0)=(0) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))>(0))
